title: Garlicky Uruguayan Wagyu Asado
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring Wagyu beef, garlic, and chimichurri.
instructions: Cut the Wagyu beef into 1-inch cubes.
In a large bowl, mix together garlic, oregano, red wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the beef cubes in a single layer.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the beef is browned on the outside and cooked to your desired level of doneness.
While the beef is cooking, prepare the chimichurri by mixing together parsley, garlic powder (if using), and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Once the beef is done, remove it from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the beef with a spoonful of chimichurri on top.
Garnish with additional parsley and serve immediately.
